title: v0.1.0 - Initial Release
description: Stabilization, test coverage, critical bug fixes. Ensure core workflows (init, propose, generate, apply, archive) are solid.

title: v0.2.0 - Polish & Testing
description: UX improvements, integration tests, dark theme support, keyboard shortcuts, and validation enhancements.

title: v0.3.0 - Advanced Features
description: Multi-project support, marketplace publishing, local AI models (Ollama), streaming API responses, spec search.
